title: Anyone know the layout of Misatos apartment in Rebuild
display_title: Anyone know the layout of Misatos apartment in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Anyone know the layout of Misato's apartment in Rebuild?             Quote Post by Smiles » Mon May 27, 2013 7:08 am The layout in rebuild seems different than in the original anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Mon May 27, 2013 7:49 am It's different than in NGE? Welp, if that's the case the layouts in the Newtype 100% Collection book won't be of much use to you.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon May 27, 2013 7:58 am Blue Monday wrote: Welp, if that's the case the layouts in the Newtype 100% Collection book won't be of much use to you.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Mon May 27, 2013 8:02 am http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/4254/Anyone-have-translations-of-the-scans-of-Misatos-apartment/

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 27, 2013 10:14 am I didn't really notice any differences, other than Asuka's 10000 boxes persisting for half the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Smiles » Tue May 28, 2013 1:13 am I'm sorry, my observation skills are bad. xC I rewatched 2.22 and they are the same I believe. My mistake.

[]:             Quote Post by xdiesp » Tue May 28, 2013 7:55 am Cool, never noticed before that the livable kitchen area wasn't the same as the living room.

Article: Anyone know the layout of Misatos apartment in Rebuild
[]: Anyone know the layout of Misato's apartment in Rebuild?             Quote Post by Smiles » Mon May 27, 2013 7:08 am The layout in rebuild seems different than in the original anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Mon May 27, 2013 7:49 am It's different than in NGE? Welp, if that's the case the layouts in the Newtype 100% Collection book won't be of much use to you.
